summary: Additive commerce graph layer: Campaign and GraphEdge models, Alembic migration 006, shop-scoped GraphRepo with idempotent upsert_edge, list_edges, and create_campaign. Five integration tests cover all acceptance criteria including tenant isolation.

interfaceChanges.description: Campaign graph node with creator_id, shop_id, predicted/realized metrics
Relationship edges: has_sold, potential_match, trust_score, predicted_vs_actual
Shop-scoped graph persistence: upsert_edge, list_edges, create_campaign

mappings.criterion: AC1: Alembic migration creates campaigns and graph_edges tables with shop_id FK and indexes
AC2: GraphRepo.upsert_edge is idempotent on (shop_id, edge_type, source, target)
AC3: GraphRepo.list_edges returns only edges for the given shop (tenant isolation)
AC4: GraphRepo.create_campaign persists Campaign node with creator_id + shop_id
AC5: Integration test proves shop A cannot read shop B graph edges

recommendations: Run alembic upgrade head on staging before P1-2 matching engine work.
